zh.lifeSummary: 當Eva Margaretha Kale於1737年7月19日出生在海因里希_海普洛文次維德梅爾斯巴賀時，她的父親Johann Wilhelm Kell29歲，母親Maria Magdalena Runkel27歲。她於大約1752年與Conrad Waggoner在美國賓夕法尼亞州結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1800年在美國北卡羅來納州卡塔巴享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eva Margaretha Kale于1737年7月19日出生在海因里希_海普洛文次維德梅爾斯巴賀时，她的父亲Johann Wilhelm Kell29岁，母亲Maria Magdalena Runkel27岁。她于大约1752年与Conrad Waggoner在美国宾夕法尼亚州结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1800年在美国北卡罗来纳州卡塔巴享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Vasant, Alka, Anil, Jayant, Narendra, Vijay, Abhay, Ajita, Alok, Amod, Aniruddha, Anjali.
Americanized form of German Köhl (see Kohl ) or Kehl , and possibly also of Kahl (compare Cale ).
English: habitational name from the villages of East and West Keal in Lincolnshire, which are named from Old Norse kjǫlr ‘ridge’.

variants.name: Keal
meanings: Perhaps an Americanized form of German Kehl or Kühl (see Kuhl ).

variants.name: Cale
meanings: English: variant of Kale , a habitational name from the villages of East and West Keal in Lincolnshire, which are named from Old Norse kjǫlr ‘ridge’.
Americanized form of German   Kehl   or   Keil  , and also of   Kahl  . Compare   Cail   and   Kale  .

variants.name: Kohl
meanings: from Middle High German kōl, köl ‘cabbage, cabbage head’ (ultimately from Latin caulis ‘stalk’), hence a metonymic occupational name for a grower or seller of cabbages. Cabbage was an important winter staple food until recent times.
from the ancient Germanic personal name Kolo. See also Koehl , compare Cole , Coll , Kail , and Kale .

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

nameMeanings.name: Margaretha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.

historicEvents.title: Becomes 12th State
historicEvents.description: On November 21, 1789, North Carolina became the 12th state in the Union.

en.lifeSummary: When Eva Margaretha Kale was born on 19 July 1737, in Melsbach, Neuwied, Rhineland, Prussia, her father, Johann Wilhelm Kell, was 29 and her mother, Maria Magdalena Runkel, was 27. She married Conrad Waggoner about 1752, in Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1800, in Catawba, North Carolina, United States, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eva Margaretha Kale est née le 19 juillet 1737, à Melsbach, Neuwied, Rhénanie, Prusse, son père, Johann Wilhelm Kell, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Maria Magdalena Runkel, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Conrad Waggoner environ 1752, à Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1800, à Catawba, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eva Margaretha Kale am 19. Juli 1737 in Melsbach, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Johann Wilhelm Kell 29 und ihre Mutter Maria Magdalena Runkel 27. Sie hat um 1752 in Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten Conrad Waggoner geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1800 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Catawba, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eva Margaretha Kale è nata il il 19 luglio 1737 nel Melsbach, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, sua padre, Johann Wilhelm Kell, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Maria Magdalena Runkel, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Conrad Waggoner circa 1752, nel Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1800, nel Catawba, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva Margaretha Kaleが1737年7月19日にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズネウウィエドメルスバチで生まれた時，父Johann Wilhelm Kellは29歳，母Maria Magdalena Runkelは27歳であった。約1752年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州でConrad Waggonerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1800年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州カタウバで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva Margaretha Kale(이)가 1737년 7월 19일 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 니우위드 멜스바치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johann Wilhelm Kell(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria Magdalena Runkel(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1752년 미국 펜실베이니아 주에서 Conrad Waggoner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1800년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 카타w바에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eva Margaretha Kale nasceu em 19 de julho de 1737, em Melsbach, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, seu pai, Johann Wilhelm Kell, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Maria Magdalena Runkel, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Conrad Waggoner aproximadamente 1752, em Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1800, em Catawba, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eva Margaretha Kale родилась 19 июля 1737 г. в местности мелсбач, неувиед, раинпровинз, Пруссия, её отцу по имени Johann Wilhelm Kell было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Magdalena Runkel, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Conrad Waggoner около 1752 г. в местности Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1800 г. в местности катавба, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eva Margaretha Kale nació el 19 de julio de 1737, en Melsbach, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, su papá, Johann Wilhelm Kell, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Maria Magdalena Runkel, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Conrad Waggoner aproximadamente 1752, en Pensilvania, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1800, en Catawba, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 64 años.
